channel.title: Testing and resources :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Flutter testing and guides: widget tests with flutter_test, Android/Web/Windows platform comparison, and practical AI integration ideas.

item.title: Flock vs Flutter 2026: what the community fork is and when to use it
item.description: What Flock is, why the community Flutter fork exists, key differences, and whether you should migrate your project.

item.title: Flutter vs Kotlin Multiplatform 2026: comparison for cross-platform apps
item.description: Comparison between Flutter and Kotlin Multiplatform in 2026: architecture differences, use cases, and which to choose for cross-platform apps.

item.title: Flutter vs React Native 2026: updated comparison to choose your stack
item.description: Full comparison between Flutter and React Native in 2026: performance, ecosystem, learning curve, and which to choose based on your project.

item.title: Riverpod 3 vs BLoC 9 vs Provider 2026: which Flutter state manager to choose
item.description: Full comparison between Riverpod 3, BLoC 9 and Provider for state management in Flutter 2026: when to use each one and why.

item.title: Flutter + AI: 5 practical ideas to build useful apps
item.description: Practical ideas to combine Flutter and AI in real products: smart forms, semantic search, and contextual assistants.

item.title: Flutter Android, Web, or Windows: practical comparison to choose your platform
item.description: Practical guide to choose between Flutter Android, Web, and Windows based on product type, delivery speed, and user experience.

item.title: Flutter Widget Test: solved UI testing exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter widget testing exercise with flutter_test to validate UI interactions and reduce regressions.
